matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 3 > Hotel Continental Breakfast

node.name: Hotel Continental Breakfast
node.description: Quick breakfast at the hotel restaurant. Simple continental options, nothing special but convenient.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Sunset Grill

node.name: Sunset Grill
node.description: Family-friendly breakfast chain with classic options. Good for kids with simple menu and quick service.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 7 > Fran's Restaurant

node.name: Fran's Restaurant
node.description: Classic Toronto diner serving breakfast all day. Casual and unpretentious with hearty portions.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 9 > Lady Marmalade

node.name: Lady Marmalade
node.description: Popular brunch spot in Leslieville known for creative breakfast dishes and great coffee. Trendy neighborhood vibe.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 10 > Hotel Quick Checkout Breakfast

node.name: Hotel Quick Checkout Breakfast
node.description: Fast breakfast before checkout. Simple pastries and coffee from hotel lobby. Rushed but necessary.
